data.name: Umichan Sentoryu
data.detailed_description:
In Umichan Sentoryu, you will experience the thrill of running a brothel cafe as Carl, a struggling businessman on hard times.

On hard times with no job in sight, you get stuck planning a café business for an old friend of yours who has graciously let you stay with her for a while. You don’t get much respect at home but the waitresses will all moan your name on the casting couch when you decide to turn her boring café idea into a much more profitable brothel cafe! So get funds together, interview the sexiest girls you can find and bust some nuts along the way. Maybe if you play your cards right, you can get into your business partner’s pants too.

Fetishes include:

MILF, Big breasts, Casting couch, Prostitution, Gangbang, Voyeur, NTR

Feature list

  • Build a harem- I mean, build a thriving cafe business as a savvy business shark.
  • 70 animations across 40+ scenes!
  • Interview potential employees and take it upon yourself to personally make sure they can satisfy future customers!
  • Experience some sexy foreplay artwork before getting into the action!
  • Collect lewd selfies that you can stroke it to while locked in your room.
  • Perv on your roommates when they are in the shower!
  • Spy on others having sex!
  • 4 possible endings!
  • Replay the fun with the unlockable image and scene galleries!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: 2.0+ GHz
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1170 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
